title: oryzopsis holciformis
intro: Oryzopsis holciformis, also known as Blue wildrye or Mountain rice grass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Oryzopsis holciformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
